slime_1.name: 灵雾妖
slime_1.description: 一团漂浮的雾气修炼成精，攻击力微弱

health_states.name: 重伤
health_states.description: 发丝凌乱，嘴角溢出一丝鲜血

health_states.name: 濒死
health_states.description: 摇摇欲坠，犹如风中残烛

snake_1.name: 翠竹蛇
snake_1.description: 竹林中的毒蛇，行动迅捷

health_states.name: 完好
health_states.description: 吐信嘶鸣，鳞片泛着寒光

health_states.name: 重伤
health_states.description: 蛇信吞吐不定，已露疲态

health_states.name: 濒死
health_states.description: 蜷缩在地，只剩最后一口生气

wolf_1.name: 嗜血狼

health_states.name: 完好

health_states.name: 重伤
health_states.description: 瘸腿而行，攻势大不如前

health_states.name: 濒死
health_states.description: 哀嚎连连，已是强弩之末

ghost_1.name: 游魂
ghost_1.description: 冤魂所化的鬼物，免疫部分物理攻击

health_states.name: 完好
health_states.description: 鬼气森森，身形飘忽不定

health_states.name: 濒死
health_states.description: 几欲消散，只剩最后一缕幽魂
